titleStmt.title: SII 23.163: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 163. (A.R. No. 163 of 1907.) Pēraiyūr, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Nāganāthasvāmi temple—on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara: year 22: 1289-90 A.D.

summary.p: This is an inscription of Māṟavarman Kulaśēkharadēva ‘who was pleased to take every country’. It registers the grant of permanent lease of tenancy of a land called the ‘Kaḍamban-Vayal’, measuring 256 kuḻi and belonging to the temple of Tirunāgīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at Tiruppēraiyūr a dēvadāna-brahmadēya village in Kānanāḍu alias Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to Veṉṟāṉ Tirumaḻapāḍi-Uḍaiyāṉ Tirupperunduṟaippiḷḷai who was holding the māḍāpatyam of the temple, on an annual rental (kaḍamai) to be paid by the lessee on a mutually agreed basis according to the nature of the crop raised. The land is said to have been purchased from one Rājarāja-Nāḍāḻvāṉ of the araśu-makkaḷ (ruling family ?) residing at Malaiyālaṅguḍi and the Mudalis of the place which is called a paḍaippaṟṟu (army settlement).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu kāṉa nāṭāna virutarā
jabhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu devatāṉa brahmadeśan tirupperaiyūr Uṭaiyār tirunāgīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoil māṭāpattiyam veṉṟān tiru
maḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa tirupperuntuṟaippiḷḷaikku Innāṭṭup paṭaip paṟṟu malaiyālaṅkuṭi Aracumakkaḷ kova Irācaṉāṉa Irācarāca nāṭāḻ vā
hmadeśantirupperaiyūr Uṭaiyār tirunāgiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil tevar kaṉmi
śrīmāheśvarakaṇṅkāṇi śrīkāriyañ ceyvār koyil kaṇakka rom Ikkoil māṭāpattiyam ve
ṉṟāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa tirupperuntuṟaippiḷḷai Uḷḷiṭ ṭāṟku kuṭiṉiṅkātteva
tāṉamāka pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivar muṉṉāḷ malaiyālaṅ kuṭi Aracu makkaḷu
m mutalikaḷum pakkal kuṭiṉiṅkāt tevatāṉamāka koṇṭa kaṭampaṉ vayalukkup perunāṉ
kellai kiḻpāṟkellai puruṣāntaṉallūr kuḷavellaikkum kumuḻam paḷḷattukkum meṟkum
tenpāṟkellai Inṉāyaṉār devatāṉam nāñci kuṭikkāṭṭukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai
malai(cai)yālaṅ kuṭikkāṭṭukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai puruṣānta ṉallūr Ellaikkut teṟkum
Āka Icaintap peruṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa vayalukkut tirumeyyattuk kolāl Irunūṟṟai
mpattāṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Oru māvāṉa nilattukku payir(nir ?) pāyt tup payiṟkoṇṭa nilattukku māttāl
ṟu kācum panṉiru kala nellum kaṭamai koṇṭu potukaiile nāṅkaḷivaṟku munṉāḷ kuṭutta kā
pāṉtal Eṇṇai yuṇṭeṉṟu colla Accātanam kāṇaveṇu meṉṟu colla Accātaṉam keṭukaiil Ivaruṉ ṉā
ṅkaḷum Icaintu Ivvāṇṭai Āṉi mātam 6- tiyati mutaliyār koyil vācal piccamutaliyārum nāṭṭil śrīrudramāhe
śvararum Iṉṉāyanār tiruvācalile kūṭi Iruntu Iṉṉāyanār devatāṉa māṉa kaṭampaṉvayal Ivarkaḷ kuṭiṉiṅkāt
tevatāṉamāka malaiyālaṅkuṭiyār pakkal vilaikoṇṭa kaṭampaṉvayal Ik kolālirunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻi
koṇṭa torumā nilattukku viḷaiyātatup payiṟkoṇṭa nilattukku māttāl kācu Irunūṟum nel patināṟkalamum
koḷḷak kaṭavomākavum Āṭikkuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ikkaṭamai yil Oṉṟu mukkāl koḷḷakkaṭavo
mākavum tiṉaivaraku viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟupāti koḷvomākavum Eḷḷuppayiṟu viḷainta nilattukkum
lirutūṇipatakku koḷvomākavum mañcaḷ karuṇai viḷainta nilat tukku pācaṉattiṟ koḷḷuṅ kaṭamai koḷvomā
kavum karumpu koṭikkāl viḷainta nilattukku kaipukka kārmutal pacāṉak kaṭamai koḷvomākavum Ippa
ṭi cammatittu candrādittavarai Ippecciṉpaṭi kaṭamai koḷvomākavum Ippaṭi Oḻiya maṟṟoṉṟu collakkaṭa
vomallavākavum Ippaṭikku tirumalaiile kal veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ittirupperuntuṟaip piḷḷai Uḷḷiṭṭā
ṟku Ittevarkanmi śrīmāseśvara kaṇkāṇi śrīkāriyañ ceyvār koyil kaṇakkarom tirumaṭaippaḷḷi taṟṟai Iṭṭu Āṭṭai
varai mevārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku koyilvācal piccaṉ Eḻuttu tevarkaṉmi tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu tevarka
ṉmi paṉmāheśvarapaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉampi Eḻuttu Avaṉi nārāyaṇa svātarāya ṉeḻuttu māṇi
kka piccapaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu kāṉanāṭṭu piccaṉ Eḻuttu virakkaḻalaḻakiyapaṭṭa ṉeḻuttu tirumeyyattu vetanāyakapaṭṭaṉ
teṉṉā ḻuttu civajñānapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu muṉṉūṟṟuvarpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu teṟkāṭṭur ka
tevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu poṟkoil paṭṭaṉeḻuttu milaṭṭūr Eḻuttu
kamuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Aññūṟṟuvar paṭṭaṉeḻuttu campaṇai viramāṇikka
ṉeḻuttu kuṉṟattūr Irācentira Eḻuttu kāraṇaṉūr tiruc ciṟṟampalatti ṉeḻuttu Aḻa paṭṭar Eḻuttu tiruStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
